home.welcomeText: A historic Palazzo from 1460 in the heart of Bassano del Grappa, offering Italian luxury and heritage.
home.aboutDescription: Built in 1460, Marinali Rooms preserves the authentic Italian Palazzo experience with modern comfort.

reviews.quote: “TRULY AMAZING STAY THAT EXCEEDED OUR HIGH EXPECTATIONS. BEST STAFF EVER! SO FRIENDLY, FUNNY, PROFESSIONAL AND CARING. THE HOTEL ITSELF IS A PIECE OF ART IN DESIGN, CONCEPT AND LAYOUT. TO TOP IT ALL OFF THE BREAKFAST, LUNCH AND DINNER AT THE BEACHHOUSE EVERYDAY WAS SUCH A HIGH LEVEL!”

“AN UNFORGETTABLE EXPERIENCE. THE ATTENTION TO DETAIL AND THE SERENE ATMOSPHERE MADE OUR STAY PERFECT. THE ARCHITECTURE BLENDS SEAMLESSLY WITH THE NATURAL BEAUTY OF THE ISLAND. CANNOT WAIT TO RETURN NEXT SEASON.”
“THE PERFECT BALANCE OF LUXURY AND RELAXATION. EVERY ASPECT OF THE STAY WAS THOUGHTFULLY CURATED. FROM THE BREAKFAST VIEW TO THE COMFORT OF THE BED, EVERYTHING WAS FIVE STARS.”

about.heroSubtitle: EXPERIENCE THE ART OF ITALIAN HOSPITALITY
about.storyTitle: BE YOURSELF WHILE FEELING YOU BELONG TO SOMETHING
about.storyDescription: Marinali Rooms is a collection of individually designed rooms and suites for the modern traveler. Born from the desire to create a space where luxury meets authenticity, we offer a unique experience in the heart of Bassano del Grappa. Our palazzo, dating back to 1460, has been meticulously restored to preserve its historic soul while providing every modern comfort.
about.storyDetails: Each corner of Marinali Rooms tells a story of heritage and craftsmanship. From the hand-restored frescoes to the carefully curated Italian design pieces, we invite you to immerse yourself in an atmosphere of timeless elegance. Our philosophy is simple: to make every guest feel at home while experiencing the extraordinary history of our city.
about.conceptDescription: Our palace represents more than just a place to stay; it is a living monument to Venetian architecture. Located on the historic Contrà dei Marinali, the building has witnessed centuries of history, from the height of the Republic of Venice to the present day. Today, it stands as a testament to the enduring beauty of Italian craftsmanship and the warmth of Mediterranean hospitality.
about.hospitalityDescription: We believe that hospitality is an art form. Our team is dedicated to providing personal, attentive service that anticipates your needs without being intrusive. Whether it's a recommendations for a local artisan workshop or a private wine tasting in our cellar, we are here to ensure your journey in Bassano is truly unforgettable.
about.ctaDescription: Explore our curated collection of rooms and suites, each designed to provide a serene sanctuary after a day of discovery.

contact.address: Via Marinali, 10, 36061 Bassano del Grappa VI, Italy

home.welcomeText: Un Palazzo storico del 1460 nel cuore di Bassano del Grappa, che offre lusso e tradizione italiana.
home.aboutDescription: Costruito nel 1460, Marinali Rooms conserva l'autentica esperienza del Palazzo italiano con il comfort moderno.

reviews.quote: “SOGGIORNO DAVVERO INCREDIBILE CHE HA SUPERATO LE NOSTRE ALTE ASPETTATIVE. IL MIGLIOR STAFF DI SEMPRE! COSÌ AMICHEVOLI, DIVERTENTI, PROFESSIONALI E PREMUROSI. L'HOTEL STESSO È UN'OPERA D'ARTE.”
“UN'ESPERIENZA INDIMENTICABILE. L'ATTENZIONE AI DETTAGLI E L'ATMOSFERA SERENA HANNO RESO IL NOSTRO SOGGIORNO PERFETTO. L'ARCHITETTURA SI FONDE PERFETTAMENTE CON LA BELLEZZA NATURALE DELL'ISOLA.”
“IL PERFETTO EQUILIBRIO TRA LUSSO E RELAX. OGNI ASPETTO DEL SOGGIORNO È STATO CURATO CON ATTENZIONE. DALLA VISTA DELLA COLAZIONE AL COMFORT DEL LETTO, TUTTO ERA A CINQUE STELLE.”

contact.address: Via Marinali, 10, 36061 Bassano del Grappa VI, Italia

home.welcomeText: Ein historischer Palazzo aus dem Jahr 1460 im Herzen von Bassano del Grappa, der italienischen Luxus und Erbe bietet.
home.aboutDescription: Das Marinali Rooms wurde 1460 erbaut und bewahrt das authentische italienische Palazzo-Erlebnis mit modernem Komfort.

reviews.quote: “WIRKLICH UNGLAUBLICHER AUFENTHALT, DER UNSERE HOHEN ERWARTUNGEN ÜBERTROFFEN HAT. DAS BESTE PERSONAL ALLER ZEITEN! SO FREUNDLICH, LUSTIG, PROFESSIONELL UND FÜRSORGLICH. DAS HOTEL SELBST IST EIN KUNSTWERK.”
“EIN UNVERGESSLICHES ERLEBNIS. DIE LIEBE ZUM DETAIL UND DIE RUHIGE ATMOSPHÄRE MACHTEN UNSEREN AUFENTHALT PERFEKT. DIE ARCHITEKTUR FÜGT SICH NAHTLOS IN DIE NATÜRLICHE SCHÖNHEIT DER INSEL EIN.”
“DIE PERFEKTE BALANCE ZWISCHEN LUXUS UND ENTSPANNUNG. JEDER ASPEKT DES AUFENTHALTS WAR DURCHDACHT KURATIERT. VOM FRÜHSTÜCKSBLICK BIS ZUM KOMFORT DES BETTES WAR ALLES FÜNF STERNE.”

contact.address: Via Marinali, 10, 36061 Bassano del Grappa VI, Italien
